UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Pentacles card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Pentacles card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Pentacles card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Pentacles card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Pentacles card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Pentacles card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the farmer's patient assessment and contemplation of the ripe pentacles in the vineyard, symbolizing hard work bearing fruit over time.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the weathered appearance of the grower, as it is a sign of experience rather than struggle.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Seven of Pentacles card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, ambient, ethereal, growth, potential, minor, instrumental

CharacterImage.Negative: barren wilted impatient rushed no fruits despair choppy cartoon vines low res deformed hoe

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Pentacles card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Pentacles card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the frustration and impatience of the speculator, as well as the barren state of the vines and few shriveled pentacles.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the hoe or the snapped wood thorns, as they are secondary elements to the main themes of this card.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Seven of Pentacles card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, minor, introspective, contemplative, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Pentacles card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Seven of Pentacles card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the struggle and determination of Tantalus gardener, his waist-deep vines with a mix of ripe and shriveled pentacles.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the chains around the grapes as they symbolize the ongoing struggle rather than an insurmountable obstacle.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Seven of Pentacles card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, woodwinds, ambient, ethereal, contemplative, growth, instrumental
